# Frontend CI (`ci-frontend.yml`)

**Triggers**: `merge_group`, `pull_request`, `push`

```mermaid
graph TD
    classDef gate fill:#4a9eff,stroke:#2563eb,color:#fff
    classDef plumbing fill:#a78bfa,stroke:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    classDef test fill:#34d399,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
    classDef collation fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
    classDef sideeffect fill:#f87171,stroke:#dc2626,color:#fff

    changes{{"Determine need to run frontend checks"}}
    frontend-bundle-size["Frontend bundle size"]
    frontend-format["Frontend formatting"]
    frontend-typescript-checks["Frontend typechecking"]
    jest["Jest test (... - ...)<br/><i>matrix: segment x chunk</i>"]
    calculate-running-time(["Calculate running time"])
    frontend_tests[["Frontend Tests Pass"]]

    changes -->|frontend| frontend-bundle-size
    changes -->|frontend| frontend-format
    changes -->|frontend| frontend-typescript-checks
    changes -->|frontend| jest
    changes -->|frontend| calculate-running-time
    frontend-bundle-size --> calculate-running-time
    frontend-format --> calculate-running-time
    frontend-typescript-checks --> calculate-running-time
    jest --> calculate-running-time
    frontend-bundle-size --> frontend_tests
    frontend-format --> frontend_tests
    frontend-typescript-checks --> frontend_tests
    jest --> frontend_tests

    class changes gate
    class frontend-bundle-size test
    class frontend-format test
    class frontend-typescript-checks test
    class jest test
    class calculate-running-time plumbing
    class frontend_tests collation
```

## Legend

| Shape        | Color  | Meaning                   |
| ------------ | ------ | ------------------------- |
| Hexagon      | Blue   | Gate / change detection   |
| Stadium      | Purple | Plumbing / matrix builder |
| Rectangle    | Green  | Test / core work          |
| Subroutine   | Yellow | Collation / status gate   |
| Rounded rect | Red    | Side effect / snapshots   |

Edge labels show the change-detection output that gates the job.

## Job details

| Job                          | Depends on                                                                       | Condition                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Matrix          |
| ---------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------- |
| `changes`                    | -                                                                                | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -               |
| `frontend-bundle-size`       | changes                                                                          | frontend && github.event_name != 'merge_group'                                                                                                                                                                                                       | -               |
| `frontend-format`            | changes                                                                          | frontend                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -               |
| `frontend-typescript-checks` | changes                                                                          | frontend                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -               |
| `jest`                       | changes                                                                          | frontend                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | segment x chunk |
| `calculate-running-time`     | jest, frontend-typescript-checks, frontend-format, frontend-bundle-size, changes | github.actor != 'dependabot[bot]' && frontend && ( (github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == 'PostHog/posthog') \|\| (github.event_name != 'pull_request' && github.repository == 'PostHog/posthog')) | -               |
| `frontend_tests`             | jest, frontend-format, frontend-bundle-size, frontend-typescript-checks          | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -               |
